case_title: BORILLO, SHEILA J. VS GALLARPE, PAZ IND/DBA TRAVELER'S CHOICE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,000.00 FILED BY BORILLO, SHEILA J. AS TO DEFENDANT GALLARPE, PAZ IND/DBA TRAVELER'S CHOICE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-06-2000 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GALLARPE, PAZ IND/DBA TRAVELER'S CHOICE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BORILLO, SHEILA J. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GALLARPE, PAZ IND/DBA TRAVELER'S CHOICE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PLAINTIFF SHEILA J. BORILLO REQUEST FOR RECONSIDERATION TO BE SUBMITTED TO THE COMMISSIONER AFTER 15 DAYS.
PLAINTIFF SHEILA J. GALLARPE REQUEST FOR RECONSIDERATION IS DENIED. ORDER SIGNED BY COMMISSIONER SUE M. KAPLAN.
